mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, job_code, biz_date, instance_status, run_attempt, trace_id, related_file_id, parent_instance_id, replay_session_id, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at from batch.job_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{jobInstanceId}

select id, tenant_id, job_code, biz_date, instance_status, run_attempt, trace_id, related_file_id, parent_instance_id, replay_session_id, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at from archive.job_instance_archive where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{jobInstanceId}

select id, tenant_id, pipeline_definition_id, job_code, pipeline_type, file_id, related_job_instance_id, current_stage, last_success_stage, run_status, trace_id, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at from batch.pipeline_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and related_job_instance_id = #{jobInstanceId} order by id asc

select id, tenant_id, pipeline_definition_id, job_code, pipeline_type, file_id, related_job_instance_id, current_stage, last_success_stage, run_status, trace_id, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at from archive.pipeline_instance_archive where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and related_job_instance_id = #{jobInstanceId} order by id asc
